<Badge text="skill-scanner" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add getsentry/skills --skill skill-scanner -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/skill-scanner`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/skill-scanner.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add getsentry/skills --skill skill-scanner -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Sentry skill for scanning/discovering or auditing agent skills themselves (meta); likely helps inventory or validate skills in a workspace.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add getsentry/skills --skill find-bugs --skill gha-security-review --skill iterate-pr --skill skill-scanner -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`; status=inspect-then-install; selector=named; policy=Inspect source, hooks, scripts, credentials, and dedupe before install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[getsentry/skills](https://github.com/getsentry/skills) (Sentry team)

## Comparable Alternatives

Other skill-inventory or manifest tools; meta skills for agents.

&gt; Evidence synthesized from public web sources (GitHub repos, official docs, skill registries); confidence reflects source reputation and public signals only. Not an endorsement.
